official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the container_close packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, writing, reading, and observing the container_close body.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound container_close frame.

field_notes.container_id: Uses the official ClientboundContainerClosePacket(int) constructor with a small non-zero container id. This is a smallest context-free fixture and does not require an initialized Menu, screen, Level, or game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound container_close packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official container id fixture only; do not infer menu lifecycle behavior, screen close behavior, inventory state, initialized game state, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
